title.en: Natural Dyeing — Physical Adsorption onto Fibre

subtitle.en: a hot bath of plant extract physically adsorbs onto the fibre — no covalent bond, but cotton, wool, and silk each grab differently and reach different colour depths
subtitle.ko: 뜨거운 식물 추출액이 섬유에 물리 흡착 — 공유결합 없음, 면·양모·실크가 다르게 잡아 색 깊이 차이

description.en: Dye bath fades as fibre absorbs (Langmuir kinetics). Cotton, wool, silk reach different saturation. Side plot shows uptake curve; the bath jar and fibre swatch both update with time.
description.ko: 섬유 흡수에 따라 욕조 옅어짐 (Langmuir). 면/양모/실크가 다른 포화에 도달. uptake 곡선 + 욕조 + 패브릭 swatch 동시 업데이트.
